---
title: "06. 主模态、兵势与脉象"
subtitle: "Dominant Modes, Strategic Force, and Pulse Patterns"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 6
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector` across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 papers."
---

## 定理锚点 / Lean Anchors

| 角色 | 定理 |
|---|---|
| 主定理核 | `goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector` |
| 支撑定理 1 | `topological_entropy_eq_log_phi` |
| 支撑定理 2 | `eigenvalue_eq_goldenRatio_or_goldenConj` |

## 文本导航 / Classical Works

- [道德经](../tao-te-ching/index.qmd)
- [易经](../i-ching/index.qmd)
- [孙子兵法](../sunzi/index.qmd)
- [黄帝内经](../huangdi-neijing/index.qmd)
- [几何原本](../elements/index.qmd)

## 论文导航 / Gen 2 Papers

- [Tilt Dynamics of Cylinder Information and the Parry Measure on the Golden-Mean Shift](../../science/gen2/zero-jitter-information-clocks-parry-gibbs-rigidity.qmd)
- [A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd)

## Infographic

![synthesis_06_spectral_theory Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_06_spectral_theory_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_06_spectral_theory_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_06_spectral_theory_infographic.png)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_06_spectral_theory_video.mp4)
- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_06_spectral_theory_slides.pdf)

## 正文 / Essay

{{< include articles/synthesis_06_spectral_theory.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
